features.description: User can create an order with at least one item
acceptance_criteria: Order appears in database with PENDING status
Validation returns 400 for empty items list
features.notes: TODO: implement PlaceOrderUseCase with outbox integration

features.description: User can list their orders with pagination
acceptance_criteria: Only orders for authenticated user are returned

features.description: User can cancel a pending order
features.notes: TODO: implement CancelOrderUseCase with state machine

features.description: Workflow engine for order state management (Issue #73)
acceptance_criteria: State machine with 9 states (PENDING through REFUNDED)
REST API endpoints for all state transitions
features.notes: Complete — NestJS uses pure TypeScript OrderStateMachine. See OrderStateController, order-state.enum.ts, order-event.enum.ts

features.description: Batch job status tracking for scheduled jobs
acceptance_criteria: Status enum: SCHEDULED, RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED
features.notes: Complete — BatchJobService with @Cron decorator. See batch-job.service.ts, test/unit/application/batch-job.service.spec.ts

features.description: Redis cache abstraction with port/adapter pattern
acceptance_criteria: CacheManager port in domain layer (zero framework deps)

features.description: Domain event publishing with outbox pattern
acceptance_criteria: OutboxEvent TypeORM entity with status enum

features.description: Tiered rate limiting for API endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Tiered rules: auth (10/min), write (60/min), export (5/min), public (30/min)

features.description: Correlation ID propagation and security audit logging
acceptance_criteria: SecurityAuditLogger tags events with SECURITY_AUDIT severity
Event types: AUTH_SUCCESS, AUTH_FAILURE, RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, etc.

features.description: External HTTP client with circuit breaker and retry
acceptance_criteria: Circuit breaker: open after 5 failures, close after 30s
Reserve inventory → authorize payment → confirm order
Compensation on failure: release inventory, void authorization
MfaMethod enum: TOTP, SMS, EMAIL, WEBAUTHN
MfaConfig port with userId, methods, backupCodes
Zero framework dependencies in domain layer
Domain layer has no @nestjs/*, typeorm, class-validator imports
Application layer has no infrastructure imports
Structural tests pass (readonly fields, VO naming, past-tense events)
features.notes: Boilerplate structure enforces Clean Architecture — see .dependency-cruiser.cjs, test/archunit/

acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for all use cases and domain models
Architecture tests for dependency-cruiser + structural rules
features.notes: Partial — 11 test files covering domain, application, infrastructure. TODO: add more controller integration tests, state machine tests, saga tests.
